topic_thesis: Rectification of Names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.
angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
hook: When a leader calls a layoff a "right-sizing," a lost deal a "strategic reprioritization," or a failed product "a learning journey," they think they're protecting morale. They're actually destroying the one thing that makes truth-telling possible.
summary:
When a leader calls a layoff a "right-sizing," a lost deal a "strategic reprioritization," or a failed product "a learning journey," they think they're protecting morale. They're actually destroying the one thing that makes truth-telling possible.
